message:
feat(conformance): add FFT differential test suite with golden-value fixtures

New conformance suite validating fnp-ufunc FFT implementations against
NumPy golden outputs with configurable absolute and relative tolerances.

crates/fnp-conformance/src/lib.rs (+384 lines):
- FftDifferentialCase struct deserialized from JSON fixtures with id,
  operation, input_shape/values, expected_shape/values, tolerances
- execute_fft_differential_operation dispatches to fft, ifft, rfft,
  irfft, fft2, ifft2, fftn, ifftn, fftshift, ifftshift, fftfreq,
  rfftfreq via UFuncArray methods
- validate_fft_differential_expectation checks shape match and per-
  element tolerances (default 1e-9)
- run_fft_differential_suite loads fixtures, executes all cases, writes
  structured JSON report to oracle_outputs/fft_differential_report.json
- Registered in run_all_core_suites()
- New test fft_differential_suite_is_green

crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/fft_differential_cases.json:
- Golden-value cases including fft_len4_golden (4-point FFT of [0,1,2,3]),
  fft_len5_bluestein_golden (Bluestein zero-padded), with env fingerprint
  fnp-ufunc-fft-packet-f

crates/fnp-conformance/src/ufunc_differential.rs:
- Simplify match to if-let for sum_result (remove dead Err arm)

crates/fnp-ufunc/src/lib.rs:
- Export UFuncArray and UFuncError for conformance crate consumption

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+    "input_values": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0],
+    "expected_error_contains": "fftshift: only 1-D arrays supported"
+  }
